org.ships.vessel.common.types.typical

Class AbstractShipType<V extends Vessel>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.ships.vessel.common.types.typical.AbstractShipType<V>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.core.utils.Identifiable, SerializableShipType<V>, ShipType<V>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AirshipType, MarsshipType, OPShipType, PlaneType, SubmarineType, WaterShipType

    public abstract class AbstractShipType<V extends Vessel>
extends java.lang.Object
implements SerializableShipType<V>
